zh.Skänninge, Stockholm, Sweden: 瑞典斯托可霍爾姆斯亞寧
zh.Genderen, North Brabant, Netherlands: 荷蘭努-布拉班特吉史德倫
zh.lifeSummary: 當Peeter Joostens Doedijns於大約1548年出生在荷蘭努-布拉班特德盧時，他的父親Joost Adriaensz Doedijns35歲，母親Agnes Peters Jans Ottensdr van Vuijthoven33歲。他和Margriet Jan Barends Van Der Dussen至少有3個兒子和3個女兒。他去世於1604年4月5日在荷蘭努-布拉班特吉史德倫享年57歲。

zh-hans.Skänninge, Stockholm, Sweden: 瑞典斯托可霍爾姆斯亞寧
zh-hans.Genderen, North Brabant, Netherlands: 荷兰努-布拉班特吉史德倫
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Peeter Joostens Doedijns于大约1548年出生在荷兰努-布拉班特德盧时，他的父亲Joost Adriaensz Doedijns35岁，母亲Agnes Peters Jans Ottensdr van Vuijthoven33岁。他和Margriet Jan Barends Van Der Dussen至少有3个儿子和3个女儿。他去世于1604年4月5日在荷兰努-布拉班特吉史德倫享年57岁。

nameMeanings.name: Peeter
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of the name of the best-known of all Christ's apostles, traditionally regarded as the founder of the Christian Church. The name derives, via Latin, from Greek petros ‘stone, rock’. This is used as a translation of the Aramaic byname Cephas, given to the apostle Simon son of Jona, to distinguish him from another of the same name ( Simon Zelotes ). ‘When Jesus beheld him, he said, Thou art Simon the son of Jona: thou shalt be called Cephas, which is by interpretation, A stone’ (John 1:42). According to Matthew 16:17–18, Christ says more explicitly, ‘Blessed art thou, Simon Bar-jona … thou art Peter, and upon this rock I will build my church’. The name has been in continuous use since the Middle Ages.

nameMeanings.name: Joostens
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Dutch and German: patronymic from   Jost  .

variants.name: Jost
meanings: form of Jodocus, Latinized form of the Breton name Iodoc, meaning ‘lord’, altered under the influence of the biblical name Job.

historicEvents.description: William of Orange was recognized as viceroy of Holland, Friesland and Utrecht.
The siege of Leiden between the rebels and the Spanish. 1574 The dikes were opened allowing a Dutch fleet to sail over the flood waters and rescue Leiden.

The Union of Utrecht brought together seven northern, Protestant provinces of the Netherlands against the Catholics. Known as the United Provinces, they become the foundation of the Dutch Republic. The Treaty of Utrecht was signed, marking the beginning of the Dutch Republic.
After the signing of the Treaty of Utrecht in 1579, Brabant became a regular battlefield between the Republic of the Netherlands (Protestant) and Spain (Catholic).
Britain waged wars against the Dutch.
"The United East India Company (V.O.C.), destined to become a powerful force in Holland's ""Golden Age""of discovery, exploration, and trade, is founded."

en.lifeSummary: When Peeter Joostens Doedijns was born about 1548, in Drunen, North Brabant, Netherlands, his father, Joost Adriaensz Doedijns, was 35 and his mother, Agnes Peters Jans Ottensdr van Vuijthoven, was 33. He had at least 3 sons and 3 daughters with Margriet Jan Barends Van Der Dussen. He died on 5 April 1604, in Genderen, North Brabant, Netherlands, at the age of 57.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Peeter Joostens Doedijns est né environ 1548, à Drunen, Brabant-septentrional, Pays-Bas, son père, Joost Adriaensz Doedijns, avait 35 ans et sa mère, Agnes Peters Jans Ottensdr van Vuijthoven, avait 33 ans. Il a eu au moins 3 fils et 3 filles avec Margriet Jan Barends Van Der Dussen. Il est décédé le 5 avril 1604, à Genderen, Brabant-septentrional, Pays-Bas, à l’âge de 57 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Peeter Joostens Doedijns um 1548 in Drunen, Nord-Brabant, Niederlande geboren wurde, war sein Vater Joost Adriaensz Doedijns 35 und seine Mutter Agnes Peters Jans Ottensdr van Vuijthoven 33. Er hatte mit Margriet Jan Barends Van Der Dussen mindestens 3 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb am 5. April 1604 im Alter von 57 Jahren in Genderen, Nord-Brabant, Niederlande.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Peeter Joostens Doedijns è nato il circa 1548 nel Drunen, Brabante settentrionale, Paesi Bassi, il suo padre, Joost Adriaensz Doedijns, aveva 35 anni e il suo madre, Agnes Peters Jans Ottensdr van Vuijthoven, aveva 33 anni. Lui avuto almeno 3 figli e 3 figlie con Margriet Jan Barends Van Der Dussen. Morì il 5 aprile 1604, nel Genderen, Brabante settentrionale, Paesi Bassi, all'età di 57 anni.

ja.Eethen, Gemeente Aalburg, North Brabant,: オランダノオルド-ブラバントイースン
ja.lifeSummary: Peeter Joostens Doedijnsが約1548年にオランダノオルド-ブラバントドルンで生まれた時，父Joost Adriaensz Doedijnsは35歳，母Agnes Peters Jans Ottensdr van Vuijthovenは33歳であった。彼はMargriet Jan Barends Van Der Dussenとの間に少なくとも3人の息子と3人の娘をもうけた。彼は1604年4月5日にオランダノオルド-ブラバントジェンデレンで57歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Peeter Joostens Doedijns(이)가 대략 1548년 네덜란드 노르드-브라반트 드루넨에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Joost Adriaensz Doedijns(은)는 35세였고, 그의 어머니 Agnes Peters Jans Ottensdr van Vuijthoven(은)는 33세였다. 그는 Margriet Jan Barends Van Der Dussen(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1604년 4월 5일 네덜란드 노르드-브라반트 젠더에서 57세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Peeter Joostens Doedijns nasceu aproximadamente 1548, em Drunen, Brabante do Norte, Países Baixos, seu pai, Joost Adriaensz Doedijns, tinha 35 anos e sua mãe, Agnes Peters Jans Ottensdr van Vuijthoven, tinha 33 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 3 filhos e 3 filhas com Margriet Jan Barends Van Der Dussen. Ele faleceu em 5 de abril de 1604, em Genderen, Brabante do Norte, Países Baixos, com 57 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Peeter Joostens Doedijns родился около 1548 г. в местности друнен, нурд-брабант, Нидерланды, его отцу по имени Joost Adriaensz Doedijns было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Agnes Peters Jans Ottensdr van Vuijthoven, 33. У него было по крайней мере 3 сына и 3 дочери от Margriet Jan Barends Van Der Dussen. Он умер 5 апреля 1604 г. в местности джендирен, нурд-брабант, Нидерланды в возрасте 57 лет.

Tuvo por lo menos 3 hijos y 3 hijas con Margriet Jan Barends Van Der Dussen. Murió el 5 de abril de 1604, en Genderen, Brabante del Norte, Países Bajos, a la edad de 57 años.
